creator: raimeetravel
caption:
My hot take about Iceland is that you should skip the Golden Circle and go here instead 👀! 

Last summer I road tripped this peninsula for 3 days with my brother before hosting my week-long Iceland group trip and we LOVED this area. 

Comment ICELAND MAP & I’ll send you my Google map of saved restaurants, sights, and things to do around the whole country (including my full 10 day Iceland itinerary as well!) 

.
.
. 
Iceland itinerary, Iceland travel, Iceland hidden gems

transcription.text: this is your quick stopover in iceland guide if you don't want to do it the way everybody else does it i'm not going to tell you to go to the golden circle i kind of think it's overrated so here's where i would go instead assuming you've got two to three days you'll definitely want to spend some time in reykjavik it's a very cool city but just two hours away this peninsula is completely underrated and it packs everything iceland is famous for into two to three very doable days here were some of my favorite sites along this route i went in august which is peak iceland season and this place had a lot less tourists than the other areas around iceland though there are still some touristy areas like the game of thrones mountain kirkupel there are just so many incredible viewpoints along this route so stop at every single one of them comment iceland map below and i'll send you my map to all of my favorite restaurants sites bars around the country
